raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation declaring personal communication boundaries and exit criteria",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker possesses (or can attain) clarity and coherence in communication",
    "speaking can occur without self-diminishment",
    "listening can occur without loss of self-boundaries",
    "a space can be objectively assessed as failing to 'honor truth'",
    "the speaker has both the discernment and the practical ability to leave such a space"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of boundary affirmations but relies on subjective and potentially contested notions of 'truth' and 'shrinking/merging'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "used reflectively by an adult with sufficient agency and safety to enact the stated boundaries, within a therapeutic or self-help context where these terms are clearly defined",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "treated as objective guarantees, used to justify premature withdrawal from disagreement, or applied in contexts where power imbalances prevent actual exit"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: self-affirmation declaring personal communication boundaries and exit criteria
implicit_claims: the speaker possesses (or can attain) clarity and coherence in communication
